debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v p : NNReal
t : ℝ
S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
⊢ ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))

proof:
intro x hx
        rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        calc
          t * x ≤ |t * x| := le_abs_self _
          _ = |t| * |x| := abs_mul t x
          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
            gcongr
            rw [abs_le]
            constructor <;> linarith [hx.1, hx.2, le_abs_self μ, neg_le_abs μ, Real.sqrt_nonneg (v : ℝ)]
successful_attempts:
intro x hx
        rw [Real.abs_exp, Real.exp_le_exp]
        calc
          t * x ≤ |t * x| := le_abs_self _
          _ = |t| * |x| := abs_mul t x
          _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √v) := by
            gcongr
            rw [abs_le]
            constructor <;> linarith [hx.1, hx.2, le_abs_self μ, neg_le_abs μ, Real.sqrt_nonneg (v : ℝ)]
